title: PhilBenchItem
description: A single item in the PhilBench benchmark (released on HuggingFace). Each item is a theory-annotated stimulus pair bundled with the model's behavioral result and the probe/patching result. Future researchers can use this as an evaluation benchmark for philosophical reasoning in LLMs.

philbench_id.description: Globally unique PhilBench item ID. Convention: pb_{thread_id}_{pair_id}

theoretical_distinction.description: The philosophical distinction this item tests

model_id.description: HuggingFace model ID used to generate this item's results

behavioral_accuracy.description: Fraction of forced-choice behavioral items answered correctly

probe_peak_layer.description: Layer with highest linear probe accuracy for this thread

probe_accuracy.description: Mean cross-validation accuracy of linear probe at probe_peak_layer

patch_peak_layer.description: Layer with largest activation patching effect. Null if patching not run.

patch_effect_size.description: KL divergence of patching effect at patch_peak_layer. Null if not run.

rsa_spearman_r.description: RSA Spearman r between model geometry and theory matrix. T4 only.

rsa_p_value.description: Mantel test p-value for RSA. T4 only.

surface_null_accuracy.description: Accuracy of surface-statistics baseline classifier. Probe must exceed this.

experiment_id.description: experiment_id from ExperimentConfig that produced this item

notes.description: Optional: observations, anomalies, caveats for this item

circuit_components.description: Circuit components identified by head sweep. Populated when circuit_analysis_enabled=True, null otherwise.

identification_criterion.description: Causal identification criterion for T1d entries. 'back_door' | 'front_door' | null for all other threads.
